productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Bio Str Black Casual Shoes
description: Don that carefully careless look with these funky sneakers from adidas. While the textured footbed massages your feet whenever you walk, the textile thong straps sit comfortably, pampering your feet. Upper Rubber thong straps with the Adidas 3-Stripe for snug Fit and protection from abrasion Fabric toe separator with the Adidas 3-Stripe branding to support the foot Brand mark on thong straps for style Foam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and style Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for greater grip and stability shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
